Dow Jones Internet Composite Index Swap

holdings.infoBox: WEBL is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 26.59%, Dow Jones Internet Composite Index Swap at 8.81%, Amazon.com at 7.61%, Cisco Systems at 6.86%, and Meta Platforms at 5.87%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Dow Jones Internet Bull 3X ETF (WEBL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ Internet Composite index. The fund provides 3x leveraged daily exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of the largest and most liquid U.S. Internet companies. WEBL was launched on Nov 7, 2019 and is issued by Direxion.
